coverage: 100% of reachable node types; the browser evaluates all 1,007 nodes in the root closure.
validation: All four Blender/VM cases now match vertex count, face count, and four-decimal local bounds exactly: authored and wrapper-enabled are 61,812 / 53,892, thickness 6 is 42,031 / 33,434, and wrapper 60 by 45 is 38,301 / 33,678. The authored chain is position-, face-, and edge-exact through marching squares, shrink, joining, Merge by Distance, all three sharpen iterations, and final positioning. Auto Smooth preserves Blender's complete original vertex block and exact radial corner-fan split, producing bit-exact positions/faces and the exact 115,015-edge set; only the rebuilt stored-edge array order is not claimed bit-identical. The final parity came from general Blender semantics: float32 domain interpolation, Map Range, dot/length/distance and acos paths; first-corner-preserving Flip Faces; float cluster averaging; preservation of the valid lobe of a pinched weld polygon; exact Split Edges radial traversal; and preventing the VM-private point-cloud marker from propagating through Instance on Points. All 323,493 triangle indices use the direct chrome Principled material: linear base color 0.2508697, Metallic 1, and Roughness 0.2610441. With the browser studio intensity calibrated to 2.0, the aligned capture reaches 0.9726 silhouette IoU, 0.5859 macro luminance correlation, 0.1024 macro luminance MAE, and -0.0017 mean luminance error; the residual is environment reflection placement across Eevee and Three.js.
